# 🌟 Air Quality Prediction System - Features

## 📱 **Mobile App Features**
- 📸 Camera integration for image capture
- 📡 Real-time sensor data input
- 🎯 Instant air quality predictions
- 📊 Mobile-optimized dashboard
- 📍 Location-based predictions
- 💾 Offline functionality

## 🤖 **AI/ML Features**
- Multi-modal deep learning models
- Advanced data augmentation
- Model optimization and quantization
- Ensemble methods and hyperparameter tuning
- Knowledge distillation for mobile

## 🌐 **API & Deployment**
- REST API with FastAPI
- Real-time data streaming
- Redis caching
- Prometheus monitoring
- CI/CD pipeline
- Docker containerization

## 📊 **Dashboard & Analytics**
- Real-time monitoring
- Interactive charts with Plotly
- Alert system
- Historical analysis
- Health recommendations

## 🔧 **Technical Stack**
- **Backend:** Python, TensorFlow, Keras
- **Frontend:** Streamlit, HTML/CSS/JS
- **API:** FastAPI, Redis
- **Deployment:** Docker, GitHub Actions
- **Mobile:** PWA, Responsive Design

🚀 **Production-ready AI system for air quality monitoring!**
